language.prompt:
Welcome! Please choose your language:

Mwakadini! Sarudzai mutauro wenyu:

waitlist.welcome:
Mwaiswa pawaitlist yedu.

Mumwe wedu achaverenga chikumbiro chako ogamuchira account yako munguva pfupi. Tichakutumira message kana wagamuchirwa.

Panguva ino, kana uchida kutipa zita reshop yako, tumira imwe message naro.
waitlist.shop_name_noted:
Thanks! We got your shop name "{shop_name}".

You're still waiting. We'll check your request soon.
waitlist.still_pending:
Thanks for your message! You're still waiting.

We'll check your request soon. We'll send you a message when you're approved.
waitlist.rejected: Sorry, we can't approve your request. Please call us if this is wrong.

approval.welcome:
Mwakadini! Account yako yagamuchirwa paAuto Tuck Shop!

Shop: {company}

Unokona kutumira voice note kana kunyora zvawatengesa nyamashi. Semuenzaniso:
'sold 2 cokes R15 each, 1 chips R10'
'3 waters R12 each, 2 chocolates R8 each'

Unogona kuwedzera vanokubatsira nekutumira:
'add assistant +27821234567'

error.processing_failed: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

audio.download_failed: Sorry, I couldn't get your voice note. Please try again or send a text message.
audio.transcription_failed: Sorry, I couldn't hear your voice note clearly. Please send a text message.

assistant.not_owner: Sorry, only the shop owner can add helpers. Talk to the owner if you need help.
assistant.missing_phone: I didn't see a phone number. Send the whole message again, like: 'add assistant +27821234567'
assistant.already_registered: This phone number {phone} is already being used.

sale.no_products: I didn't see any items. Send everything you sold in one message, like: "sold 2 cokes R15 each, 1 chips R10"
sale.missing_prices_note: Some items don't have prices. Press "Paita Mistake" and send again with prices, like "2x Pear @ R5".
sale.bot_mistake: Sale thrown away. Send your items again to redo.
sale.cancelled: ✗ This sale was thrown out. Send everything again to redo it.
sale.price_too_large: One or more prices seem too large. Please double-check and resend, e.g. "sold 2 cokes R15 each"
